query_skills.name: search-strategy
query_skills.description: How to effectively search this wiki. IndiaMART acronyms, QMD vs grep vs keyword_search tips, search patterns by query type.

query_skills.name: contact-finder
query_skills.description: How to find who to contact at IndiaMART. Person page lookups, owner fields, email extraction, team structure.

query_skills.name: wiki-navigation
query_skills.description: How to navigate the wiki structure. 8 domains, page types, wikilink format, coverage window, special pages.

query_skills.name: qmd-usage
query_skills.description: How to use QMD hybrid search effectively. BM25+vector+RRF explained, do's and don'ts, what's indexed.

query_skills.name: indiamart-context
query_skills.description: IndiaMART organizational knowledge. Key products, teams, mailing lists, internal tools, what this wiki covers.

query_skills.name: gap-tracker
query_skills.description: What to do when information is missing. How to handle 'not found', common gaps, coverage limitations.

compile_skills.name: content-filter
compile_skills.description: Strip noise from raw emails: signatures, forwarded chains, quoted replies, HTML artifacts, greetings, CC lists.

compile_skills.name: merge-detection
compile_skills.description: Decide whether to create new page or merge into existing. Wikipedia rules: primary topic, >50% overlap, parent hub.

compile_skills.name: article-structure
compile_skills.description: Enforce wiki page template: Lead + Key Details + Sources mandatory. Frontmatter validation.

compile_skills.name: link-audit
compile_skills.description: Post-compilation audit: find orphan pages, dead-end pages, broken wikilinks. Suggest cross-links.
